title: hippochaete ramosissima var. japonica
intro: Hippochaete ramosissima var. japonica, also known as Japanese mountain club moss, is a type of plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Japanese mountain club moss include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
